Sections.name: show_hero
Sections.label: Show Hero
Sections.help_text: Display the hero banner on the homepage.

Sections.name: show_featured_product
Sections.label: Show Featured Product
Sections.help_text: Display a single featured product spotlight on the homepage.

Sections.name: show_featured_products
Sections.label: Show Featured Products
Sections.help_text: Display the featured products grid on the homepage.

Sections.name: show_featured_categories
Sections.label: Show Featured Categories
Sections.help_text: Display the featured categories section on the homepage.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_image
Hero.label: Hero Image
Hero.help_text: Full-width hero image. Use a high-quality product or lifestyle photo.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_image_mobile
Hero.label: Hero Image (Mobile)
Hero.help_text: Optional mobile-optimized hero image. Falls back to desktop image if not set.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_heading
Hero.label: Hero Heading
Hero.help_text: Large heading text overlaid on the hero image.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_text_color
Hero.label: Hero Text Color
Hero.help_text: Color for text on the hero image. Leave blank for white.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_text_align
Hero.label: Hero Text Alignment
Hero.help_text: Alignment of heading and subheading text on the hero.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_height
Hero.label: Hero Height
Hero.help_text: Minimum height of the hero section.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_overlay_color
Hero.label: Hero Overlay Color
Hero.help_text: Color overlay on the hero image for text readability. Leave blank for no overlay.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_overlay_opacity
Hero.label: Hero Overlay Opacity
Hero.help_text: Opacity of the hero overlay (0 = transparent, 100 = solid).

Hero.name: homepage_hero_alt
Hero.label: Hero Image Alt Text
Hero.help_text: Accessible description of the hero image.

Hero.name: homepage_hero_link
Hero.label: Hero Link URL
Hero.help_text: Where the hero button links to (e.g. /catalogue/).

Featured Product.name: featured_product
Featured Product.label: Product
Featured Product.help_text: Select a single product to spotlight on the homepage.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_header
Featured Product.label: Section Heading
Featured Product.help_text: Heading above the featured product. Leave blank to hide.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_description
Featured Product.label: Custom Description
Featured Product.help_text: Override the product description with custom text.

Featured Product.name: featured_product_bg_color
Featured Product.label: Background Color
Featured Product.help_text: Section background color. Leave blank for white.

Featured Products.name: featured_products
Featured Products.label: Products
Featured Products.help_text: Products to feature on the homepage.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_header
Featured Products.label: Section Heading
Featured Products.help_text: Heading above the featured products grid. Leave blank to hide.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_columns
Featured Products.label: Columns (Desktop)
Featured Products.help_text: Number of product columns on desktop.

Featured Products.name: featured_products_bg_color
Featured Products.label: Background Color
Featured Products.help_text: Section background color. Leave blank for white.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories
Featured Categories.label: Categories
Featured Categories.help_text: Categories to feature on the homepage.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_header
Featured Categories.label: Section Heading
Featured Categories.help_text: Heading above the featured categories. Leave blank to hide.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_columns
Featured Categories.label: Columns (Desktop)
Featured Categories.help_text: Number of category columns on desktop.

Featured Categories.name: featured_categories_bg_color
Featured Categories.label: Background Color
Featured Categories.help_text: Section background color. Leave blank for white.

Product Images.name: product_gallery_layout
Product Images.label: Image Gallery Layout
Product Images.help_text: Position of thumbnail navigation on product pages.

Product Images.name: product_media_fit
Product Images.label: Image Display
Product Images.help_text: How product images are displayed in cards and galleries.

Product Information.name: variant_picker
Product Information.label: Variant Picker Style
Product Information.help_text: How product variants (size, color, etc.) are displayed.

Product Information.name: product_description_placement
Product Information.label: Description Layout
Product Information.help_text: Where the product description appears relative to the image gallery.

Product Reviews.name: product_reviews
Product Reviews.label: Enable Product Reviews
Product Reviews.help_text: Show customer reviews on product pages.

Recommended Products.name: show_recommended
Recommended Products.label: Show Recommended Products
Recommended Products.help_text: Display recommended products section on product pages.

Footer Style.name: footer_bg_color
Footer Style.label: Background Color
Footer Style.help_text: Footer background color. Leave blank for light gray.

Footer Style.name: footer_text_color
Footer Style.label: Text Color
Footer Style.help_text: Footer text color. Leave blank for default.

Footer Style.name: footer_link_color
Footer Style.label: Link Color
Footer Style.help_text: Footer link color. Leave blank for default.

Social Media.name: enable_social
Social Media.label: Show Social Links
Social Media.help_text: Display social media icons in the footer.

Payment Icons.name: pay_icons
Payment Icons.label: Payment Icons
Payment Icons.help_text: Select payment method icons to display in the footer.

Disclaimer.name: site_disclaimer
Disclaimer.label: Site Disclaimer
Disclaimer.help_text: Optional legal disclaimer displayed at the very bottom of the footer.

Fonts.name: font_script
Fonts.label: Custom Font Embed Code
Fonts.help_text: Paste a font embed code (e.g. Google Fonts link tag) to load custom fonts.

Fonts.name: font_body
Fonts.label: Body Font Family
Fonts.help_text: CSS font-family for body text. Leave blank for system font stack.

Fonts.name: font_header
Fonts.label: Heading Font Family
Fonts.help_text: CSS font-family for headings. Leave blank to inherit body font.

Cart.name: sidecart_open_on_add
Cart.label: Open side cart on add to cart
Cart.help_text: Automatically open the side cart when a product is added.

Site Settings.name: site_index
Site Settings.label: Disable Search Indexing
Site Settings.help_text: Add noindex, nofollow meta tag to prevent search engines from indexing.

Site Settings.name: account_only
Site Settings.label: Account Only Mode
Site Settings.help_text: Hide navigation and storefront content. Shows only account login.

Site Settings.name: account_only_show_footer
Site Settings.label: Show Footer in Account Only
Site Settings.help_text: Display the footer (contact info, links, payment icons) on the account only screen. Disable for a minimal login-only view.

Custom Code.name: custom_css
Custom Code.label: Custom CSS
Custom Code.help_text: Add custom CSS styles. Warning: custom styles may need updating when the theme is updated.

Navbar Style.name: navbar_bg_color
Navbar Style.label: Navbar Background Color
Navbar Style.help_text: Background color for the header. Leave blank for white.

Navbar Style.name: navbar_link_color
Navbar Style.label: Navbar Link Color
Navbar Style.help_text: Text and icon color for the header. Leave blank for default.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_text
Announcement Bar.label: Announcement Text
Announcement Bar.help_text: Short announcement displayed at the top of the page. Leave blank to hide.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_bg_color
Announcement Bar.label: Background Color
Announcement Bar.help_text: Announcement bar background color. Leave blank for primary color.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_text_color
Announcement Bar.label: Text Color
Announcement Bar.help_text: Announcement bar text color. Leave blank for white.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_link
Announcement Bar.label: Link URL
Announcement Bar.help_text: Optional link URL for the announcement.

Announcement Bar.name: ab_placement
Announcement Bar.label: Show On
Announcement Bar.help_text: Where the announcement bar is displayed.
